name: 原电池
subject: chemistry
curriculum_points:
1.7.A.2
Trends in atomic properties within the periodic table (periodicity) can be predicted by the position of the element on the periodic table and qualitatively understood using Coulomb’s law, the shell model, and the concepts of shielding and effective nuclear charge. These properties include:
i. Ionization energy
ii. Atomic and ionic radii
iii. Electron affinity
iv. Electronegativity.

1.7.A.3
The periodicity (in 1.7.A.2) is useful to predict/estimate values of properties in the absence of data.

1.7.A.1
The organization of the periodic table is based on patterns of recurring properties of the elements, which are explained by patterns of ground-state electron configurations and the presence of completely or partially filled shells (and subshells) of electrons in atoms.

interactive_resources.pdb_hint: 搜索 RCSB PDB 数据库获取分子 ID
interactive_resources.description: 3Dmol.js 化学分子三维结构展示

errors.description: 只记年代与名词，不能用史料与制度变迁解释历史进程。
把传说叙述与考古/文献证据混为一谈，未区分证据强度。

exercises.stem: 结合课标要求，说明「原电池」的核心内涵，并各举一条史料或史实依据。
exercises.answer:
应答扣课标要点：1.7.A.2
Trends in atomic properties within the periodic table (periodicity) can be predicted by the position of the elem…；并区分证据类型（文献/考古/制度等）。

exercises.stem:
用因果链解释：1.7.A.3
The periodicity (in 1.7.A.2) is useful to predict/estimate values of pro… 对理解「原电池」为何重要？
exercises.answer: 需写出前因—制度/经济/思想变化—后果，避免只罗列年代。
